subject: (no subject)
body:
cousin geraldine's coming tomorrow till the 1st. said charlie K saw you in the street. T or F?
If you're going in, I'll be flying in to PBI on the 18th, leaving the 20th. If it comes down, I BETTER get to visit. Set it up so Darren makes sure there are no roadblocks. Serious.
